# learnloop-ai
An Agentic AI Study Buddy that teaches, tests, and improves user understanding through interactive learning loops using LLMs.

# 🚀 LearnLoop AI

LearnLoop AI is an **Agentic AI Study Buddy** that helps users learn any topic through an intelligent loop of:

👉 Explain → Ask → Evaluate → Improve → Repeat

---

## 🧠 Features

* 📖 Topic-based explanations using LLMs
* ❓ Auto-generated questions
* 🧪 Answer evaluation
* 🔁 Adaptive learning loop
* 🎯 Focus on weak areas

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

* Frontend: React
* Backend: Node.js / Python
* AI: LLM APIs

---

## 🎯 Goal

To build a system that goes beyond chatbots and acts as a **personal AI tutor** using Agentic AI concepts.

---

## 📂 Project Structure (Planned)

```
learnloop-ai/
│
├── frontend/       # React app
├── backend/        # API + agent logic
├── prompts/        # Prompt templates
└── README.md
```
